privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.whoWeAreBody: Timer Tempo is a free online timer tool available at timertempo.com. This is an independent project. Contact:
privacy.dataWeCollectBody: Timer Tempo does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. All timer data is stored locally in your browser using localStorage and never leaves your device.
privacy.advertisingBody1: We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google AdSense may use cookies to show relevant ads based on your browsing history. Learn more at
privacy.advertisingBody2: . To opt out of personalised advertising visit
privacy.cookiesBody: Timer Tempo itself sets no cookies. Cookies on this site are set exclusively by Google AdSense for advertising purposes.
privacy.yourRightsBody: Since we hold no personal data, there is nothing to access, correct, or delete. For data held by Google, refer to Google's privacy controls.
